geographic_scope_description: Europe and Central Asia (ECA), encompassing the European Union, Switzerland, and Central Asian countries. Regulatory and installation contexts reflect Swiss and European Union conditions, with grid connection infrastructure aligned to European transmission networks. The scope follows the ECA geographic classification defined in the dataset's nomenclature section.

Encompasses the European region (RER), including political territories and grid connections aligned with the European Union and Switzerland. Regulatory and installation contexts reflect European energy market conditions, with cost base parameters derived from the Europe and Central Asia (ECA) region as defined in the nomenclature.

Switzerland (CH), encompassing its national political territory, grid connection boundaries, and regulatory context within the European cost base (ECA). Aligns with ISO country code CH and includes Swiss-specific conditions for energy systems, infrastructure, and policy frameworks.
Global coverage encompassing all political regions and grid connections worldwide. No specific regional boundaries or grid connections are defined.
